# 🚀 Pull Request Template

---

## Description

> Please provide a short summary of the changes made and the purpose of this PR.

- **Feature Proposal:** ...
- **OR Fixes a bug:** '...' happened when '...'

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow **Conventional Commits** guidelines.
- [ ] Run `yarn lint`, `yarn build`, and `yarn test` — all checks are passing.
- [ ] Updated **README** or documentation if necessary.

---

## Steps to Test

1. Describe the steps to test the changes.
2. Include screenshots or logs if applicable.

---

## Relevant Issues

> Link any related issues, e.g., Fixes #123
